metadata.description: Triggers an action or event when activated.

useCases.title: Form submission
useCases.description: Use to submit data in a form.

properties.name: variant
properties.description: Visual emphasis level: primary, secondary, or ghost.

documentBlocks.notes: Must have a visible focus indicator. Use aria-disabled instead of the disabled attribute when the button should remain focusable.

constraints.rule: Always provide a visible text label or aria-label.
Do not use for navigation — use a link element instead.
Pair a disabled button with a tooltip or inline explanation of why it is disabled.

agents.disambiguation: Use Button for actions that change state or submit data. Use Link for navigation. Use IconButton when label space is unavailable.

antiPatterns.correction: Always pair a disabled Button with a tooltip or visible explanation so users understand why the action is unavailable.

antiPatterns.pattern: Using a Button to navigate to another page
antiPatterns.correction: Use a Link component or an anchor element for navigation. Buttons are for actions, not navigation.
